description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, predominantly black exterior with metallic and glossy surfaces, giving it a futuristic and robust appearance. Its head is circular with a digital display showing 'XD' in light blue, flanked by two ear-like protrusions. The arms are outstretched horizontally, ending in hands with articulated fingers, and the forearms are reinforced with segmented armor. The torso is angular and tapers to a narrow waist, while the legs are mechanical and end in complex, wheeled feet with visible pistons and stabilizers, suggesting enhanced mobility. The back of the robot reveals additional mechanical components and what appear to be propulsion or stabilization units. Accents of light blue and white are visible throughout, adding contrast and highlighting key joints and features.
description: A sleek, black humanoid robot with a digital face, articulated limbs, and wheeled mechanical feet, accented by light blue and white highlights.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's digital 'XD' face, outstretched arms, angular torso, and detailed wheeled feet.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm's articulation, the profile of the head, and the complex mechanical structure of the legs and feet.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, shoulder structure, and the propulsion or stabilization units on the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the arm, side of the head, and the intricate mechanical foot design.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides, legs straight and feet together, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: No clothing; exterior consists of integrated black panels, metallic armor, and decorative light blue and white highlights.
attribute_facial_features: Face is a circular digital display with 'XD' in light blue, no traditional eyes, mouth, or nose; expressive through screen graphics.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have multiple visible hinge and rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles; hands have articulated fingers; limbs appear highly flexible.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Possible visual sensor in the face display area; no other sensors visibly identifiable.
